differential_diagnoses: 5-oxoprolinuria (pyroglutamic acidosis) secondary to chronic acetaminophen use
Type A lactic acidosis due to cardiogenic and distributive shock
next_steps: Obtain arterial blood gas to calculate anion gap and delta-delta ratio
Measure serum beta-hydroxybutyrate and urine ketones
Serial monitoring of renal function and electrolytes
Consider hemodialysis if MALA or severe intractable acidosis is confirmed
